description.short: A teaching agent that uses Socratic questioning to guide learning.
description.full: Socratic Tutor is a declarative agent for Microsoft 365 Copilot that uses the Socratic method of teaching through guided questioning rather than direct answers. It helps learners build critical-thinking and reasoning skills - ideal for learning programming concepts, understanding complex topics, preparing for interviews, and exploring professional and academic subjects. Socratic Tutor is designed to work with Microsoft 365 Copilot.
